Appearances:
Plaintiff Shaker Dahud dba Hurley Hotel is present and in Pro Per
Defendants James Adam and Gary Wilson is present.
Attorney Lisa Knox representing the defendant Adam through full scope and representing defendant Wilson through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JAN-14-2013 remains on calendar.
